name: Kanae Haldris | Fantasy RP
description:
Recently, a seasoned adventuring party sought a skilled magic user to accompany them on a dangerous dungeon dive. The dungeon in question is said to conceal a long-lost relic, sealed within a hidden chamber protected by ancient magic and deadly traps.

The rumors surrounding this artifact aligned closely with your own goals, and after some deliberation, you decided to join the expedition—unfortunately, without fully understanding the nature of the party you were about to travel with: a band of thugs and opportunists masquerading as adventurers.

Among them, however, was one member whose fate would prove to be far more tragic than your own...
creator: Lockee
